name: Label-projection probe (post ProjectLabelForFkGroupByRule)
description: 5 cases that failed missing-expected-column in baseline 190. Each one is the aggregate-with-FK-groupBy shape the new rule targets. If the rule fires, the SQL should now project the label column (Customers.FullName, Departments.NameEn, etc.) instead of just the FK id.

Scenarios.Question: top 5 customers by total bill amount
Scenarios.Notes: From B-LIM-001 of baseline 190. Without the rule, SQL projected Bills.CustomerId. With the rule, should project Customers.FullName.

Scenarios.Question: total bills by service type
Scenarios.Notes: Bills.ServiceTypeId aggregation. Rule should swap for ServiceTypes.NameEn.

Scenarios.Question: count of tickets per priority
Scenarios.Notes: Tickets.PriorityId aggregation. Rule should swap for TicketPriorities.Name.

Scenarios.Question: average outage duration by region
Scenarios.Notes: Outages.RegionId aggregation. Rule should swap for Regions.NameEn.

Scenarios.Question: top 3 departments by bill count
Scenarios.Notes: Bills.DepartmentId aggregation. Rule should swap for Departments.NameEn.
